title: Glowing [Redstone Addon]
description: An addon for Glowing texture pack that adds compatibility with new redstone torch textures
body:
An addon for [Glowing](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing) texture pack which adds support for the new vanilla texture for redstone torches.
- Put in on top of the original Glowing pack in the resource pack screen.
- Needs Continuity to work.
> Credits:
> - 7777777_4547 for the original Glowing pack
